title: Session Events, Atomic Checkpoints, Idempotent Resume, Fork, and Replay · Behavior Case: Session Identity
summary: Mutable session blobs overwrite history, checkpoints split state from effects, resume repeats a tool call, and a debugging replay contacts production services. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the session identity increment in append-only replayable agent session. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pr…
objectives: Define tenant, user, session, invocation, interaction, turn, attempt, call, effect, checkpoint, and parent identities and their lifetimes.
Resume only after revalidation; handle approve, reject, edit, revoke, expire, duplicate submission, changed policy, and already-completed action.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-session-checkpoint-replay-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_session_checkpoint_replay_5(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-session-identity-97b1cd
# Competency: agentpy-session-identity.
# Case 3551: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries.
def evidence_agentpy_session_identity_97b1cd(events: int = 36, persisted_events: int = 36, checkpoints: int = 6, replayed_checkpoints: int = 6, duplicate_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_97b1cd = "97b1cd-dc1b79-3551"
    assert evidence_variant_97b1cd
    evidence_axes_97b1cd = (
        "authority97b1cd",
        "interaction3551",
        "tooldc1b79",
        "state97b1cd3551",
        "evaluation355197b1cd",
        "recoverydc1b793551",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_97b1cd)) == 6
    if events < 1 or persisted_events < 0:
        return False, persisted_events, "session-event-count"
    if persisted_events != events:
        return False, persisted_events, "event-loss"
    if checkpoints < 2 or replayed_checkpoints != checkpoints:
        return False, replayed_checkpoints, "checkpoint-replay"
    if duplicate_effects > 0:
        return False, duplicate_effects, "replay-effect-duplication"
    assert persisted_events == events and replayed_checkpoints == checkpoints and duplicate_effects == 0
    return True, replayed_checkpoints, "replayable-agent-session"
